summary: The payments-api is returning elevated 5xx errors on /v1/charges in us-east-1 shortly after the v1.18.5 deploy. The strongest current clue is a NullPointerException in the retry handler when a cache miss occurs.

incident.title: Payments API retry-handler NPE on cache miss
incident.description: payments-api returning 5xx on /v1/charges after deploy. Stack traces show NullPointerException in retry handler when cache miss occurs. us-east-1 only.
incident.resolution: Rolled back payments-api to v1.18.4. Patched retry handler to null-check cache lookup. Re-deployed v1.18.6 once regression test covered the cache-miss path.
incident.rca_summary: Cache-miss path in the retry handler was not exercised in pre-prod. Deploy of v1.18.5 introduced an unguarded dereference. Resolved by rollback + targeted regression test.

source_quality.notes: resolution is empty; rca_summary is empty; description is short

similar_incidents.warning: Strong text match, but the stored record is sparse — derived suggestions may be weak.

suggested_steps: Confirm the deploy timeline for payments-api v1.18.5 and check whether the error spike began immediately after rollout.
Inspect logs for /v1/charges and group stack traces to verify the NullPointerException in the retry handler is the dominant failure mode.
Roll back or disable the risky retry-handler change if the deploy correlation and stack traces line up.
Verify us-east-1 health after mitigation by watching 5xx rate, p95 latency, and checkout success metrics.
Open a follow-up bug to add cache-miss coverage for the retry handler before redeploying the fix.

rca.summary: payments-api began returning 5xx responses for /v1/charges in us-east-1 shortly after v1.18.5 was deployed. The available evidence points to a retry-handler regression triggered by cache misses.
rca.root_cause: A NullPointerException in the payments-api retry handler on cache miss likely caused requests to /v1/charges to fail with 5xx responses after the v1.18.5 deploy.
contributing_factors: The issue appeared shortly after a production deploy.
The failure was region-specific to us-east-1.
The cache-miss retry path appears to have insufficient test coverage.
timeline: 2026-05-07T14:25:00Z - error rate reached 6.2% over a three-minute window.
2026-05-07T14:26:00Z - stack traces showed NullPointerException in the retry handler on cache miss.
preventive_actions: Add regression tests for retry-handler cache-miss behavior.
Add a canary check for /v1/charges before full regional rollout.
Alert on sudden regional 5xx spikes immediately after deploys.
Require rollback criteria for payments-api deploys that affect charge creation.
